headline: Northrop Grumman (NOC) Honors Grant Jewell After Global ORBIE Cybersecurity Award
summary: Northrop Grumman (NYSE:NOC) executive Grant Jewell received the Global ORBIE Award for cybersecurity leadership. Jewell serves as Corporate Director & Deputy CISO, with the award recognizing leadership, business transformation, and industry impact. The recognition underscores the company’s focus on cybersecurity across its defense and aerospace operations. For investors watching Northrop Grumman, this award highlights how central cybersecurity is to the company’s role in the defense and...

headline: Jefferies Lowers Northrop Grumman (NOC) Price Forecast despite Steady Revenue Growth Outlook
summary: Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE:NOC) is included among the 10 Best Dividend Stocks to Buy for Passive Income. On June 26, Jefferies lowered its price recommendation on Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE:NOC) to $580 from $620. It reiterated a Hold rating on the shares. In its second-quarter preview, the firm estimated that Northrop Grumman’s revenue would grow […]
